top_signals.title: Stocks Gain on Optimism Over US-Iran Deal to Open Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Equities climbed and US oil prices were lower as investors bet that a deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz was close, even as hostilities flared to test the fragile ceasefire.

top_signals.summary: Investigators seized more than 800 servers as they arrested two men suspected of violating European sanctions and assisting pro-Russian cyberattacks and disinformation campaigns.

top_signals.title: India's KPI Green Energy Eyes $1 Billion Renewables Trust Launch by 2028
top_signals.summary: India-based KPI Green Energy expects to raise up to $1 billion from the launch of an infrastructure investment trust backed by renewable energy assets, KP Group’s top executive told Reuters on Tuesday. KPI Green Energy Limited, a Gujarat-based solar and hybrid power generating company of KP Group, expects to launch the renewable infrastructure investment trust at the end of the 2027/2028 financial year, KP Group’s chairman and managing director, Faruk Patel, told Reuters. The planned trust is expected to have between 1.5 gigawatts (GW)…

top_signals.summary: The Turner River solar farm represents the final solar installation required to deliver the company’s Real Zero decarbonization plan.
